query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_puzzles, COUNT(DISTINCT opening_name) as unique_openings, COUNT(DISTINCT opening_variation) as unique_variations, MIN(rating) as min_rating, MAX(rating) as max_rating, COUNT(CASE WHEN opening_name IS NOT NULL AND opening_name != '' THEN 1 END) as with_opening FROM puzzles;
